title: Divergence in Clothing Purchases and Furniture Purchases in China
section_path: Divergence in Clothing Purchases and Furniture Purchases in China
section_path_text: Divergence in Clothing Purchases and Furniture Purchases in China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's retail sales in December grew year-on-year by 7.4%. This is down from November's recent peak but is still a healthy level. Taking December's 0.3% contraction into account, retail sales adjusted for inflation grew year-on-year by 7.7%.
